name: Latron
description: The Latron is a highly efficient rifle that performs well at medium and at long range, its accuracy making it a deadly weapon in the hands of skilled marksmen.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Latron is a highly efficient rifle that performs well at medium and at long range, its accuracy making it a deadly weapon in the hands of skilled marksmen.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Hotfix 32.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Latron (base and Wraith) having a weird delayed recoil animation, causing it to look choppy and unnatural when shooting.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Prime Vault: 29.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Ember Prime, Frost Prime, Latron Prime, Reaper Prime, Sicarus Prime, and Glaive Prime Relics have been added back to the droptables!

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Prisma Latron Armor being misaligned when equipped on Nova’s Atomica Skin.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Update 27
patchlogs.changes:
Latron: 1.3->1.4
Latron Wraith: 1.3->1.35

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.6
patchlogs.changes: Latron Prime

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.3
patchlogs.changes: Latron / Latron Wraith / Latron Prime

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.changes: Ember Prime, Frost Prime, Loki Prime, Wyrm Prime, Bo Prime, Sicarus Prime, Glaive Prime, Latron Prime, and Reaper Prime Relics have been added as Cetus Bounty rewards for a limited time. You can also find these limited Vaulted Relics in Relic Packs from the Market or as Syndicate rewards.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Latron Wraith mag size returned to 15 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.additions: The Latron, Sicarus, and Hikou have all received PBR treatment.
patchlogs.changes: Changed the tints on the default shader for the Latron as it was all dark, and not fitting the icon!

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Update 19.12.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the volume of the Latron and Latron Prime 3D firing sounds.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes: Increased Ammo Pool of Latron Wraith in Conclave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Latron not actually alarming enemies.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crackling noise when firing the Latron Wraith while using Loki’s Invisibility or Ivara’s Prowl.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Latron series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Frost Prime, Latron Prime and Reaper Prime have returned to their place in the Prime Vault, restoring Void Drop Tables to their previous values.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.changes:
Frost Prime, Titan Extractor Prime, Latron Prime, Reaper Prime and the Misa Prime Syandana will all be available for a limited time through our Prime Access Program.  Additionally, the following drops have been made available in the Void for a limited time:
Latron Prime Parts

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Double Tap (Latron): On hit, +30% damage for 0.5 seconds.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.changes: Latron series damage decreased in PvP

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • Increased the damage of the Latron series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Latron series damage increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.changes: All Latron series weapon damage has been decreased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Latron Prime Blueprint dropping from Reinforced Orokin Loot Crates instead of Boltor Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Latron Wraith and Prime weapons appearing in list of eligible components when crafting the Tiberon rifle.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.changes: More than 3000 pts = Latron Wraith and the Polar Glaxion skin

patchlogs.name: Update 13.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Latron Prime Blueprint missing from the Void.

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes: Latron and Latron Prime now have increased damage.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Added custom recoil animations for Latron Prime, and Lato.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Lato Vandal, Latron Prime, Lato Prime, Snipetron Vandal, Sobek updated fire sounds.

patchlogs.name: 8.0.5: It's Getting Hot(Fix) In Here
patchlogs.fixes: Increased drop rate of Reaper Blade and Latron Prime Receiver to "Common" for Void Level "III" Missions

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.2 : Comin In' Hot!
patchlogs.fixes: Latron Prime recipes reading "Ash Chassis" requirement

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
